creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
I thought I replied to this, but apparently not.  Sorry.

This is on my todo list for the start of the 11.0-RELEASE slush (next week), since these bits need a bit a massaging for the final release, due to consistency between the package builds and package list included in the script.

(For example, gnome2 -> gnome3 during 10.2-RELEASE.)

It isn't forgotten, but since we don't make dvd ISOs for -CURRENT snapshots, it hasn't been changed yet, but it will be.
